title: Underp Hangables
description: A small mod that removes the derpyness of broken Paintings and Item Frames
body:
# Description

A small mod that fixes the derpyness of the dropped items from Paintings and Item Frames when they are broken.

Basically this mod adjusts the position of the dropped items so that they are not inside the wall behind the Painting/Item Frame, and it also removes the horizontal random motion from the dropped item.

**Note:** The mod is only needed on the server side.

**Note for Minecraft 1.9+:** This annoying issue was fixed in vanilla for the 1.9 update. So this mod is now mostly unnecessary in MC 1.9 and later. There is still the tiny difference that this mod also completely removes the random horizontal motion, so the items drop straight down. But that's it.
